race.comment: M'LADY ROSE (4) was well bet last start over 1500m at Ballarat when fourth, beaten 2.5 lengths. Fitter for the three runs back and looks ideally placed here over the longer trip. Winkers have been removed for this and looks ready to fire. HERE COMES RUBY (3) was a winner two back then was safely held when sixth over 2020m at Mornington latest. Back in grade for this and expected to bounce back. NAJLE (9) is fitter for two runs back and looks ready to fire now. Bombed the start in a richer race at Pakenham last time and this suits third-up. MAWHERA (2) hasn't done much in recent outings but is worth another chance in this line-up.
